category_sources: source_facts.description says cdk8s defines Kubernetes native apps using object-oriented programming; official cdk8s docs describe automation for Kubernetes resources.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cdk8s; official homepage and GitHub organization use cdk8s.
docs_sources: Official cdk8s.io documentation is linked from the official repository and provides getting-started guides.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive is cdk8s-cli; official cdk8s umbrella repository lists cdk8s-team/cdk8s-cli as the command-line interface repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists cdk8s; source_facts.description and official docs identify Kubernetes app/resource definition and manifest generation.
